lesson.lesson_title: Ken Talks About His Best Friend

sentences.sentence_en: Do you have a best friend, Ken?
sentences.sentence_vi: Ken, bạn có bạn thân không?
sentences.sentence_ipa: /du ju hæv ə bɛst frɛnd kɛn/
accepted_answers: do you have a best friend ken

sentences.sentence_en: Oh, yeah. My best friend is Jim.
sentences.sentence_vi: Ồ, có. Bạn thân nhất của tôi là Jim.
sentences.sentence_ipa: /oʊ jæ maɪ bɛst frɛnd ɪz dʒɪm/
accepted_answers: oh yeah my best friend is jim

sentences.sentence_en: And how long have you known each other?
sentences.sentence_vi: Hai bạn quen nhau bao lâu rồi?
sentences.sentence_ipa: /ænd haʊ lɔŋ hæv ju noʊn itʃ ˈʌðər/
accepted_answers: and how long have you known each other

sentences.sentence_en: Not so long. About a year, wait, no, two years.
sentences.sentence_vi: Không lâu lắm. Khoảng một năm, à không, hai năm.
sentences.sentence_ipa: /nɑt soʊ lɔŋ əˈbaʊt ə jɪr weɪt noʊ tu jɪrz/
accepted_answers: not so long about a year wait no two years

sentences.sentence_en: Yeah, we met at the tennis club two years ago.
sentences.sentence_vi: Ừ, chúng tôi gặp nhau ở câu lạc bộ tennis hai năm trước.
sentences.sentence_ipa: /jæ wi mɛt æt ðə ˈtɛnɪs klʌb tu jɪrz əˈɡoʊ/
accepted_answers: yeah we met at the tennis club two years ago

sentences.sentence_en: Oh, so you play tennis with each other?
sentences.sentence_vi: Ồ, vậy hai bạn chơi tennis cùng nhau à?
sentences.sentence_ipa: /oʊ soʊ ju pleɪ ˈtɛnɪs wɪð itʃ ˈʌðər/
accepted_answers: oh so you play tennis with each other

sentences.sentence_en: Well, against each other, really. You know, we both try to win.
sentences.sentence_vi: Thực ra là đấu với nhau. Bạn biết đấy, cả hai đều cố gắng thắng.
sentences.sentence_ipa: /wɛl əˈɡɛnst itʃ ˈʌðər ˈrɪli ju noʊ wi boʊθ traɪ tə wɪn/
accepted_answers: well against each other really you know we both try to win

sentences.sentence_en: And who usually wins – you or him?
sentences.sentence_vi: Và ai thường thắng – bạn hay anh ấy?
sentences.sentence_ipa: /ænd hu ˈjuʒuəli wɪnz ju ɔr hɪm/
accepted_answers: and who usually wins you or him

sentences.sentence_en: I’m not very good at tennis.
accepted_answers: im not very good at tennis
i am not very good at tennis

sentences.sentence_en: But I usually win when we play chess.
sentences.sentence_vi: Nhưng tôi thường thắng khi chơi cờ vua.
sentences.sentence_ipa: /bət aɪ ˈjuʒuəli wɪn wɛn wi pleɪ ʧɛs/
accepted_answers: but i usually win when we play chess

sentences.sentence_vi: Hai bạn cũng chơi cờ vua à?

sentences.sentence_en: Oh, yeah. And I’m definitely a better chess player than he is!
sentences.sentence_vi: Ồ, đúng vậy. Và tôi chắc chắn chơi cờ vua giỏi hơn anh ấy!
sentences.sentence_ipa: /oʊ jæ ænd aɪm ˈdɛfənətli ə ˈbɛtər ʧɛs ˈpleɪər ðæn hi ɪz/
accepted_answers: oh yeah and im definitely a better chess player than he is
oh yeah and i am definitely a better chess player than he is
